# Algorithmic Model Taxonomy

| Model | Main variable | Explains |
|---|---|---|
| Rank flip | score gap | why boundary manipulation matters |
| Feedback loop | exposure/engagement recurrence | why early boosts compound |
| Bandit | posterior reward estimate | why early fake success can bias testing |
| Social proof | visible popularity | why fake proof recruits real behaviour |
| Threshold cascade | adoption thresholds | why small seeds can trigger larger spread |
| Preferential attachment | current popularity | why rich-get-richer systems are vulnerable |
| Coordination graph | repeated co-actions | how to detect organized behaviour |
| Null model | shuffled baseline | how to avoid overclaiming |
| Profile injection | fake interaction matrix rows | how fake users can perturb recommenders |
| Budget feedback | measured conversions | how fake leads redirect spend |
